nodes.name: Bamboo warbler
nodes.summary: The bamboo warbler (Locustella alfredi) or bamboo scrub-warbler, is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is sparsely distributed across central-eastern Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. References
